text: Accepted all seven outcomes. Portable verification: 500 JVM core tests, 491 Scala.js core tests, 30 laws on each platform, optimized JS linking, Scala 3.4 consumer compile, Vector/native/FFM/Breeze suites, benchmark compile, and JVM/JS API docs. Focused receipts meet dense destination, workspace, compressed-pattern, and symbolic-plan allocation gates. Canonical contracts now distinguish structure-preserving from structure-changing operations. Source audit confirms no new public storage adoption or backing-array exposure. JVM sparse-direct remains an explicit capability-less seam with documented no-go gates.
